case_title: SLAY, DIANE vs. STATE OF CALIFORNIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLAY, DIANE AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA CALIFORNIA TRANSPORATION SILVER STAR COACH LINES DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-04-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-07-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-14-1994
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT STATE OF CALIFORNIA CALIFORNIA TRANSPORATION

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-04-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-04-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-02-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLAY, DIANE
STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLAY, DIANE
OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-02-1994, CONTINUED TO JUL-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF SHALL NOTIFY DEFENDANTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS & EXPENSES OF SUIT
